onboarding.title: Become a host
onboarding.subtitle: Join our host community and start earning income with your vehicle
onboarding.benefitEarnDesc: Generate income with your vehicle when you're not using it
onboarding.benefitControlDesc: You decide who rents your vehicle and when
onboarding.benefitEasyDesc: Manage everything from the app easily
onboarding.stepsDesc: Complete these steps to start listing your vehicles
onboarding.faqEarningsA: Hosts earn on average $10,000-$30,000 per month depending on the vehicle and availability.
onboarding.faqRequirementsQ: What do I need to get started?
onboarding.faqRequirementsA: You need a vehicle in good condition, a valid driver's license, and to complete identity verification.
onboarding.faqInsuranceA: All rentals include protection insurance that covers damage and theft during the rental period.
